focus_points.label: Principal-level impact and leverage visibility
focus_points.reason: What Principal-level impact should look like on this team, and whether his current work is showing up in that way yet.

focus_points.label: What “Principal scope” means on this team
focus_points.reason: Whether he understands the Principal bar on this team after moving teams, or if he’s still operating on old assumptions about scope and expectations.

focus_points.label: Cross-team trust and expectation management
focus_points.reason: Whether cross-team trust is developing—especially around setting expectations early and handling hard news—versus staying in safe execution mode.

focus_points.label: Judgment calls: when to push vs escalate
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s making and socializing the tradeoff calls that only a Principal should own, or if he’s avoiding questions and escalation when uncertainty is high.
